academic.trend: Consistent high performer across all subject areas

ecActivities.name: Robotics Club

ecActivities.en_description: Led team to win FIRST LEGO League Championship

ecActivities.name: Digital Music Ensemble

ecActivities.en_description: Created original digital compositions for school performances

self_intro_zh:
我叫林浩然，對科技和創意充滿熱情。我擅長編程和機器人設計，曾帶領團隊獲得FIRST LEGO League冠軍。我也熱愛數碼音樂創作，喜歡用科技表達創意。

貴校的國際課程和創新教學理念深深吸引我。我相信在這樣多元開放的環境中，我能進一步發揮科技和藝術的潛力。

學習目標：在IB課程框架下深入探索科技與藝術的交集。

規劃：短期適應IB學習模式；中期修讀Higher Level電腦和數學；長期進入頂尖科技大學，成為創新型科技人才。
self_intro_en:
I am Ethan Lam, passionate about technology and creativity. I excel in programming and robotics design, having led my team to win the FIRST LEGO League Championship. I also love digital music composition, expressing my creativity through technology.

Your school's international curriculum and innovative teaching philosophy deeply attract me. I believe that in such a diverse and open environment, I can further unleash my potential at the intersection of technology and art.

My Goals: Explore the intersection of technology and arts within the IB curriculum framework.

My Plans: Short-term: adapt to IB learning mode. Medium-term: take Higher Level Computer Science and Mathematics. Long-term: enter a top technology university and become an innovative tech talent.

teacher_comment.comment_zh: Ethan是一位極具天賦的學生，在科技和創意領域表現卓越。他的團隊合作精神和解決問題能力令人印象深刻。強烈推薦。
teacher_comment.comment_en: Ethan is an exceptionally talented student who excels in technology and creative fields. His teamwork spirit and problem-solving abilities are truly impressive. I give him my highest recommendation.
